base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_power_bracelet — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Power Bracelet — allows Link to push Armos-statue blocks to reveal hidden staircases. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Power Bracelet — allows Link to push Armos-statue blocks to reveal hidden staircases
